name: Susan Prince
ai_summary: Susan Prince ran an in-home daycare in Illinois with kids from 8 weeks to 5th grade and now lives in Peoria, AZ; she's available FT/PT starting Fridays, resolves conflicts by separating children and discussing, and goes above and beyond to engage with kids through play and dance.

transcripts.q3: Hi, my name is Susan Prince. I moved to Arizona about five years ago, but when I was in Illinois, I had an in-home daycare, the range of kids for eight weeks to fifth grade. I love working with kids because it's I like to see their facial expressions and how they start some worm and how excited they get.
transcripts.q5: Right now, is it only the first day on Fridays for any kind of those two days part-time full-time. It doesn't matter availability to will change in a couple of months where I could work Tuesday through Friday.
transcripts.q6: When dealing with conflict, I would separate the children and talk to them. Both, find out what was happening. Having apologized to each other, and let them know that we only make nice touches.
transcripts.q7: I feel like I would be an asset because I love to work with the kids. I go above and beyond and healthy. I like to intermingle with them, dance with them, play with them, whatever reason story, and just watch them grow.
